category_sources: source_facts.description says Dirac is a general-purpose video codec; official SourceForge page categorizes it as Video.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name; official SourceForge project title is Dirac.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge project page is the best available project documentation surface found; no dedicated docs path was confirmed.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SourceForge project page exposes a Code tab for the project.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a video codec; source_facts.executables lists encoder/decoder CLI tools; official SourceForge page lists C++ as programming language.
